name: Fudge Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in the top of a double boiler over boiling water.
2. Add the unsweetened chocolate and heat until melted.
3. Add sugar, 1/2 cup at a time, stirring until dissolved.
4. Stir in the salt.
5. Slowly add the evaporated milk.
6. Mix well.
7. Chill several hours before using.
